mapper.sql: spec_id, order_id, spec_name, spec_price, spec_stock, spec_sales, spec_sort, create_time
mapper.insert: insert into tb_order_spec (order_id, spec_name, spec_price, spec_stock, spec_sales, spec_sort, create_time) values (#{orderId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{specName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{specPrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{specStock,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{specSales,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{specSort,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.select:
select
from tb_order_spec where order_id = #{orderId,jdbcType=INTEGER} order by spec_sort asc, spec_id asc
mapper.update: update tb_order_spec set spec_stock = #{stock} where spec_id = #{specId}
update tb_order_spec set spec_sales = spec_sales + #{count} where spec_id = #{specId}
